programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: It’s the finale of Country Ball season one. Through their journey, Dylan and Luca have become brothers. With Jesse’s help, they’ll show just how much they’ve grown as players. Get ready to cheer for some incredible football. You’re not going to want to miss this!

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies (1937)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy heads to the Rockies where he becomes involved in a dispute between ranchers and troublemakers threatening the peace of the region. With courage, quick thinking, and a few songs along the way, he works to restore order and protect those in danger.

programme.title: Ride, Ranger, Ride (1936)
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger goes undercover to infiltrate a gang of outlaws involved in a series of robberies, working to expose their operation and bring them to justice while protecting innocent lives

programme.title: Saddle Mountain Roundup (1941)
programme.desc: A cowboy steps in to help a ranching community threatened by a gang trying to take control of local land and cattle. As tensions rise in the Saddle Mountain region, he rallies allies and confronts the outlaws in a fight to restore justice and protect the settlers.

programme.title: The Gabby Hayes Show - Telescope
programme.desc: Dramatizing the lives of historical figures, such as the naval commander, the lawman and professional gambler, and the outlaw Belle, tall tales and Western scenes

programme.title: Ben and Charlie 1972
programme.desc: In Ben and Charlie, Giuliano Gemma and George Eastman team up in a Spaghetti Western full of action, humor, and mischief. Ben, a smooth-talking drifter, and Charlie, a hot-tempered brawler, form an unlikely partnership as they stumble from one scheme to another across the frontier. Chased by outlaws, double-crossed by swindlers, and forever at odds with each other, the two rogues turn trouble into adventure at every turn. With sharp banter, lively gunfights, and offbeat charm, this buddy Western proves that friendship can be as wild as the West itself.

programme.title: Bounty Killer 1965
programme.desc: In Bounty Killer, Thomas Milian stars in a gripping Spaghetti Western of greed, betrayal, and bloodshed. When a drifter discovers the profitable trade of hunting men for money, he quickly rises as a ruthless bounty killer. But as his reputation grows, so do the dangers—outlaws, rival hunters, and his own thirst for power push him toward a violent reckoning. With stark desert landscapes, brutal gunfights, and the grit of Italian Western style, this tale shows the high price of killing for gold.

programme.title: The Last of the Clintons
programme.desc: Cowboy infiltrates an outlaw gang to expose their rackets, but after he's ordered to kidnap a young girl, the gang finds out who he really is.

programme.title: Dan Candy's Law
programme.desc: Based on an actual event, this is the tragic story of Saskatchewan fugitive Almighty Voice, a Cree Indian who is arrested for stealing government livestock out of desperate hunger.

programme.title: Town Hall: Body Image in a Social World
programme.desc: Body image is a big deal and keeping up with everyone’s looks is a constant battle our young people confront on a daily basis. We’ll take a look at what steps kids and parents can take, and what help might be available for those struggling with body image.
